Create or update UsagePeriod

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"description":"The list of UsagePeriod objects that you want to add or update. If usagePeriodId is null or 0 then it is added if usagePeriodId is not null and non 0 it is updated","in":"query","name":"usagePeriod"}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>
